q: The world's reliance on electronics is very great.
We can say that we live in an electronic age.
A television receiver is an electronic appliance.
A radio receiver is an electronic appliance.
A computer is an electronic appliance.
A mobile phone is an electronic appliance.
A laptop is an electronic appliance.
A DVD player is an electronic appliance.
A hearing aid is an electronic appliance.
A pacemaker is an electronic appliance.
A blood pressure monitor is an electronic appliance.
An oximeter is an electronic appliance.
A microwave oven is an electronic appliance.
An automatic vehicle is an electronic appliance.
A refrigerator is an electronic appliance.
A washing machine is an electronic appliance.
A robotic is an electronic appliance.
Electronic devices contain circuitry that involves active electrical components and associated passive interconnection technologies.
Electronic circuits contain active electrical components only.
Electronic circuits contain passive electrical components only.
Passive electrical components require a power source to operate.
The vacuum tube is an active electrical component.
The transistor is an active electrical component.
The diode is an active electrical component.
The Integrated Circuits are active electrical components.
The TRIACs are active electrical components.
The SCRs are active electrical components.
The LEDs are active electrical components.
Active electrical components are capable of operating without an external power source.
A resistor is a passive electrical component.
A capacitor is a passive electrical component.
An inductor is a passive electrical component.
A transformer is a passive electrical component.
An LDR is a passive electrical component.
A transducer is a passive electrical component, (according to Textbook).
The pn junction diodes are fabricated using semiconductors.
The transistors are fabricated using semiconductors.
A zener diode is a vacuum diode.
A zener makes the current flow in the backward direction when forward biased.
A zener operates like the normal diode when in the forward-bias mode.
Whenever the voltage across the terminals of a zener diode is reversed, the junction breaks down.
The zener breakdown will occur only when the reversed voltage reaches the zener voltage.
The main difference between a zener diode and a normal diode lies in the passage of current.
Zener breakdown occurs at the junctions, which are being lightly doped.
Zener breakdown occurs at the junctions, which have wide depletion layers.
Avalanche breakdown occurs at the junctions, which are being heavily doped.
Avalanche breakdown occurs at the junctions, which have narrow depletion layers.
A zener diode has a reverse-breakdown voltage at which the diode starts to conduct electric current, and remains continuous in the reverse-bias mode.
The voltage drop across the zener diode always remains constant irrespective of the applied voltage.
The zener diode is used for voltage regulation as a reference element.
The LED is a semiconductor light source.
The LED is a pn junction diode.
The LED is a vacuum diode.
The LED emits light when a current flows through it.
The LDR is known to be one of the best optoelectronic devices.
The LDR is a semiconductor light source.
The LED is capable of emitting a fairly narrow bandwidth of light.
There are some LEDs which emit visible light.
There are some LEDs which emit invisible light.
There are some LEDs which emit infrared.
There are some LEDs that emit orange light.
There are some LEDs that emit red light.
There are some LEDs that emit yellow light.
There are some LEDs that emit green light.
The commonly used invisible light for LED is ultraviolet light.
The LEDs are made from pure semiconductor elements.
In an LED, the energy is radiated in the form of light.
The LEDs do not directly produce white light.
LEDs are used in huge video displays at sporting events and concerts.
An LED indicator circuit, one of the main applications of LED.
A slight excess in voltage or current can damage the LED.
LEDs are known to have a much wider bandwidth than lasers.
The LED temperature depends on the radiant output power and wavelength.
LEDs are little effective in wide-area.
A current limiting resistor should be connected in parallel with the LED.
A photodiode is a semiconductor device that converts electrical current into light.
An LED is a semiconductor device that converts light into electrical current.
Photodiodes work in forward-biased mode.
When an external load is connected to the photodiode, the photocurrent flows.
A photodiode will produce electricity whenever light falls on it.
A photodiode can produce a small current in no light.
Germanium and gallium arsenide can also be used to fabricate photodiodes.
The photosensor receiving the remote signal in a CD player is a photodiode.
The photosensor receiving the remote signal in a TV receiver is a photodiode.
Photodiodes can be used to respond to light levels.
Photodiodes can be used to switch on street lighting after dark.
An LED is a light-controlled variable resistor.
A light-dependent resistor (LDR) is a light-controlled fixed resistor.
In dark or dim light, the LDR has only a few electrons to carry electric charges.
In dark or dim light, the LDR becomes a poor conductor of electric current.
In bright light, there are more electrons to carry electric charge in an LDR.
In bright light, the LDR becomes a good conductor.
In bright light, the resistance of the LDR is low.
As the light level increases, the LDR resistance increases.
Cadmium sulfide can be used to make LDR.
Lead sulfide can be used to make LDR.
The LDRs are used in burglar alarms.
The LDRs are used in some alarm clocks.
The LDRs are used in light intensity meters.
The resistance of semiconductors decreases when the temperature rises.
When the semiconductor is heated its resistance increases.
The most commonly used thermistor is the PTC thermistor.
The NTC's resistance increases as the temperature increases, and vice versa.
The PTC's resistance increases as the temperature increases, and vice versa.
The NTC thermistor is used to break the circuit at preset temperatures.
Liquid crystals are liquids.
Liquid crystals are solid crystals.
A liquid crystal display (LCD) is a flat-panel display.
An LCD is an electronically modulated optical device.
An LCD uses the light-modulating properties of liquid crystals combined with polarizers.
Liquid crystals do not emit light directly.
Liquid crystals use a backlight or reflector to produce images.
An LCD can produce colour images.
An LCD can produce monochrome images.
LCDs are lit by a backlight.
LCD pixels are switched ON and OFF electronically.
In an LCD, a polarizing glass filter is placed in front and behind all the pixels, the front filter is placed at 90°.
In an LCD, the liquid crystals are between the filters.
The liquid crystals can be electronically switched ON and OFF.
LCDs can be commonly found in smartphones.
LCDs can be commonly found in televisions.
LCDs can be commonly found in computer monitors.
LCDs can be commonly found in some instrument panels.
LCDs allowed displays to be much thinner than cathode ray tubes.
LCDs consume much less power than LEDs.
LCDs consume much less power than gas-plasma displays.
An LED emits light directly.
LCDs have begun being replaced by organic light-emitting diodes (OLEDs).
